page_content:
International Students

International students on F-1 and J-1 student visas must maintain full-time enrollment throughout each semester/term according to federal regulations governing F-1 and J-1 students. Please contact an advisor in International Student and Scholar Services at 301-314-7740 for questions concerning full-time status, or visit: globalmaryland.umd. edu/offices/international-students-scholar- services/maintaining-status-1.
